nasb.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: “The daughter of Babylon is like a threshing floor At the time it is stamped firm; Yet in a little while the time of harvest will come for her.”

esv.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: The daughter of Babylon is like a threshing floor at the time when it is trodden; yet a little while and the time of her harvest will come.”

cnv.text: 因為萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說： “巴比倫城好像正被踹平的禾場， 再過片時，她被收割的時候就到了。”

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说： “巴比伦城快要被毁灭了， 它要被夷为平地， 好像被踏平的麦场一样。”
